case_title: WEST AMERICAN INSURANCE COMPANY vs. HOLLOWAY, CLIFFORD ET AL

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEST AMERICAN INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT HOLLOWAY, CLIFFORD  ET AL SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-12-1993

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEST AMERICAN INSURANCE COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOLLOWAY, CLIFFORD  ET AL $4,070.49 PRINCIPAL, $99.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,169.49
